one_time_description: Prior period adjustment restating deferred revenue, accounts receivable, accounts payable and tangible capital assets from fiscal year 2020
economic_notes: Nation operates a gas bar/grocery retail facility (demolished and replaced February 2021, now operated by Chilcotin River Trading Company LLP). Economic development entities include equipment rental operations (Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development Corporation LLP), Dechen Ventures, and BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. COVID-19 noted as non-adjusting event with uncertain future impact. Wildfire litigation ongoing with Government of Canada over denied reimbursement of 2017 wildfire expenditures.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Five government business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method: Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development Corporation, Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development Corporation LLP, Dechen Ventures Ltd., Chilcotin River Trading Company Ltd., and BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Significant prior period restatement of 2020 figures (Note 20) affecting deferred revenue, accounts receivable, accounts payable and tangible capital assets. Wildfire receivable of $501,689 net of $311,815 allowance still outstanding with litigation filed against Government of Canada. Gas bar facility demolished February 2021 and replaced by entity owned/operated by Chilcotin River Trading Company LLP. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $11,100,791 + FNHA $2,036,919 + Province of BC $1,893,400 + Government of Canada $162,081 + CCATEC $71,184 = $15,264,375 less segment eliminations; OSR includes gas bar sales, rental revenue, interest, GBE equity income, and other revenue. No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statements.
